# awscc_observabilityadmin_telemetry_enrichment (Data Source)

Data Source schema for AWS::ObservabilityAdmin::TelemetryEnrichment



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) Uniquely identifies the resource.

### Read-Only

- `scope` (String) Scope of the Telemetry Enrichment
- `status` (String) Current status of the resource tags for telemetry feature (Running, Stopped, or Impaired).
